title: Incorrect Medication Reference
evidence: human_agent: I have that you are out of within a pearl.
should_have: The agent should have accurately acknowledged the patient's request for a refill of Lisinopril instead of referencing an unrelated term.

title: Repeated Request for Phone Number
evidence: human_agent: What is the best phone number for staff to call you back about your refill?
should_have: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's provided phone number (555-123-4567) instead of asking for it again.

title: Repetitive Inquiry About Pharmacy Details
evidence: human_agent: Great. Please tell me the name of the pharmacy at any details.
should_have: The agent should have processed the previously provided pharmacy information instead of asking for it again.
